archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy)
emotional_tone: Welcoming, trustworthy, professional, delicate, humanized. Non-clinical.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-brand-dark

spacing_and_layout.general: Mobile-first priority. High-end, generous padding (py-16 to py-24 for sections). Vertical rhythm established through clear negative space. Eliminate visual clutter.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Use extreme rounding (rounded-[2rem] or rounded-3xl) for cards and sections to create a soft, safe, organic feel suitable for pediatrics. Hero image must be rounded-full.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Center alignment for Hero and Final CTA to emphasize conversion. Left alignment for reading-heavy cards and lists.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#25D366] text-white font-semibold px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(37,211,102,0.25)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-[#20BD5C] transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-lg
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-[#795C8A] text-white font-medium px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(121,92,138,0.25)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.base: p-8 rounded-[2rem] bg-white border border-[#2B2330]/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.colored_variants: Use the soft lilac, pink, and green colors as full background fills for the specific cards in the 'Para quem é' section, removing the border and keeping the text dark.

sections_instructions.name: Hero Section
sections_instructions.layout: Flex column, center-aligned, max-w-2xl mx-auto text-center px-4 pt-16 pb-12.
sections_instructions.content: Professional circular photo, overline 'Fonoaudiologia Infantil', H1 'Fernanda Loyola', elegant subtitle addressing speech delay/communication development, Primary WhatsApp CTA.
sections_instructions.visuals: Background is sand/light beige base (#F8F6F1). Add a soft, decorative abstract CSS blob (blur-3xl) in soft lilac behind the photo to frame it.

sections_instructions.name: Para Quem é o Atendimento
sections_instructions.layout: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 px-4 py-16 max-w-6xl mx-auto.
sections_instructions.content: 3 main cards representing target issues (e.g., Atraso de fala, Dificuldades de comunicação, Trocas na fala).
sections_instructions.visuals: Assign each card a distinct pastel background (lilac, pink, green). Use a clean Lucide icon at the top of each card in the brand primary color.

sections_instructions.name: Como Funciona
sections_instructions.layout: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 px-4 py-16 bg-white max-w-6xl mx-auto items-center.
sections_instructions.content: 3-step list: 1. Avaliação, 2. Plano Individual, 3. Atendimento Humanizado.
sections_instructions.visuals: Left side: vertical steps with numbers or connecting lines. Right side: The 'Mother and child smiling' supporting image, rounded-[2rem].

sections_instructions.name: Atendimento Presencial
sections_instructions.layout: Soft bordered container or soft green background container, max-w-4xl mx-auto text-center py-12 px-6 rounded-[2rem] my-12.
sections_instructions.content: Location details: Baixada Fluminense / Nova Iguaçu. Emphasize a welcoming, safe environment.
sections_instructions.visuals: Use MapPin icon. Emphasize the text layout with generous line height.

sections_instructions.name: Final CTA
sections_instructions.layout: Full width block, heavily padded (py-20), bg-brand-primary text-white text-center.
sections_instructions.content: Encouraging closing statement reassuring parents. Massive primary WhatsApp Button (maybe contrasting white button with green text, or green button).
sections_instructions.visuals: Clean, distraction-free. The entire focus is the WhatsApp button.

sections_instructions.name: Footer
sections_instructions.layout: Simple flex column, center aligned, py-8 bg-[#F8F6F1] text-brand-muted text-sm.

sections_instructions.name: Floating WhatsApp
sections_instructions.visuals: Circular or pill-shaped, standard WhatsApp green. Apply hover scale and drop-shadow-xl. Ensure it does not cover the footer content.

images.description: Fernanda Loyola professional photo. Crop circular (rounded-full).
Mother and child smiling. Use in 'Como Funciona' section to build empathy and trust. Apply soft rounded-[2rem] corners.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React. Set strokeWidth={1.5} to maintain the delicate aesthetic. Required icons: MessageCircle (WhatsApp), MapPin, CheckCircle/Baby/Ear for the cards.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Specifically: 'hero-whatsapp-cta', 'final-whatsapp-cta', 'floating-whatsapp-cta'.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: You are building a Google Ads landing page. Conversion (WhatsApp clicks) is the ONLY goal. The design must be extremely clean, mobile-optimized, and free of distracting animations. Use the exact hex codes provided to achieve the 'Pastel & Soft' pediatric aesthetic without looking like a sterile clinic. Avoid default Shadcn card borders if they look too rigid; prefer the soft rounded-[2rem] shapes and pastel backgrounds for visual separation. DO NOT use generic stock vectors; rely on the provided imagery and elegant typography. Remember to implement standard semantic HTML for basic SEO.
